title: No branch for 1.42
body:
For previous releases there were branches and tags, e.g. branches `release-1.36`, `release-1.39`, `release-1.41` and tags `v1.40.1`, `v1.41.0`, `v1.41.1`, `v1.41.5`.

Why for the tag/release `v1.42.0` there is no branch `release-1.42`?

comments.body: No big mystery, it just hasn't been created yet.  @TomSweeneyRedHat are we waiting on anything?  I think we want to cherry pick #6395 onto it when we create the branch.
Not waiting, just forgetting to make the branch.  Thanks for the poke, I just created it.
